verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Like a dry and thirsty land Crying for a drop of rain That’s how I used to fill the emptiness inside As the deer that’s hurt and wounded Runneth for the water brooks That’s how my soul longs to come before my God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’m crying let the rain of heaven (showers of blessings) fall upon my thirsty soul Let the rain of heaven (showers of blessings) fall on me Blessed Holy Spirit won't you come and fill my soul Let the rain of heaven fall on me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I’ve tried to seek and searched but cannot find On all those things this world could give But still my soul keeps on thirsting to be satisfy There's a deep calls to the deep There has to be a deep respond Lord please open the windows of heaven for me.
